title: senna spectabilis var. excelsa
intro: Senna spectabilis var. excelsa is a variant of the Senna spectabilis plant, a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. It is native to tropical Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains anthraquinone glycosides, which have laxative properties, and has been traditionally used to treat constipation, digestive issues, and other gastrointestinal problems. Herbal preparations of Senna spectabilis var. excelsa, such as teas and extracts, can be used to promote regular bowel movements, improve digestion, and support overall gut health.
